name: cargurus / Auto workflow 537
task: Calculate monthly payment for car value of $50,000 and downpayment of $10,000 with interest rate of 4% for 60 months.
goal_pattern: Calculate monthly payment for car value of $50,000 and downpayment of $10,000 with interest rate of 4% for 60 months.

applicability.when_to_use: Use for tasks with a similar goal on the same site area.

steps.success_signal: The page advances or the selected field reflects the intended value.
